SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2002 -WITS. S/E DOC. EVID. INTRODUCED. COURT AWARDS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF ELVIN S SMITH PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT AND AGAINST MODERN KITCHEN EXPO INC. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT FOR $2593.59 AND $50.00 COSTS. JPT BRUCE LUBARSKY, CLERK J. BAUBEL, NOT REPORTED (525)
